sections.paragraph:
- Original: πρότερον

- Transliteration: Proteron

- Phonetic: prot'-er-on

- Definition:

1. before, prior

a. of time, former

- Origin: neuter of G4387 as adverb (with or without the art.)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: Neuter of G4387 as adverb (with or without the article); previously: - before (at the) first former.
